APPEARING: 20-80 (2d8x10) ARMOR CLASS: MOVEMENT: 6, Sw 12 HIT DICE: 1-4 hit points THACO: 20 NO. OF ATTACKS: DAMAGEIATTACK: By weapon type SPECIAL ATTACKS: Charm SPECIAL DEFENSES: Nil MAGIC RESISTANCE: 25 % SIZE: 5 (4') MORALE: Average (8-10) XP VALUE: 120 Nixies are water sprites that live in fresh water lakes, and while carry no grudge against humankind, delight in enslav- men as their beasts of burden .
